auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Kit API key sent with the X-Kit-Api-Key request header. Create or copy a personal API key from Kit's developer settings: https://app.kit.com/developer_settings

actions.name: create_subscriber
actions.description: Create a Kit subscriber, or update the existing subscriber with the same email address.

fields.description: Custom field values keyed by custom field label. Kit ignores fields that do not exist.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating or upserting a Kit subscriber.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the subscriber was created.

fields.description: Custom field values keyed by custom field label. Kit ignores fields that do not exist.

anyOf.description: Timestamp when the subscriber cancelled, when returned.
Subscriber attribution metadata returned by Kit.
Timestamp when the tag was created.

tags.description: Tags included on the subscriber when requested.

anyOf.description: Subscriber location metadata returned by Kit.
Timestamp when the subscriber was added to a form.
Timestamp when the subscriber was tagged.
Referrer returned for a form subscriber.
UTM parameters returned for a form subscriber.

outputSchema.description: The response returned for a single Kit subscriber.

actions.name: get_current_account
actions.description: Get the current Kit account and authenticated user details.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for getting the current Kit account.

anyOf.description: Kit user ID when returned by Kit.

plan_type.description: Kit plan type for the account.

primary_email_address.description: Primary email address for the account.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the account was created.

name.description: IANA timezone name configured for the Kit account.

friendly_name.description: Human-readable timezone name returned by Kit.

from_name.description: Display name used for the sending address.

status.description: Verification status of the sending address.

is_default.description: Whether this is the default sending address.

is_verified.description: Whether Kit has verified this sending address.

is_dmarc_configured.description: Whether DMARC is configured for the sending domain.

sending_addresses.description: Sending addresses configured for the account.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when getting the current Kit account.

actions.name: get_subscriber
actions.description: Get one Kit subscriber by ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for getting a Kit subscriber.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the subscriber was created.

fields.description: Custom field values keyed by custom field label. Kit ignores fields that do not exist.

anyOf.description: Timestamp when the subscriber cancelled, when returned.
Subscriber attribution metadata returned by Kit.
Timestamp when the tag was created.

tags.description: Tags included on the subscriber when requested.

anyOf.description: Subscriber location metadata returned by Kit.
Timestamp when the subscriber was added to a form.
Timestamp when the subscriber was tagged.
Referrer returned for a form subscriber.
UTM parameters returned for a form subscriber.

outputSchema.description: The response returned for a single Kit subscriber.

actions.name: list_form_subscribers
actions.description: List Kit subscribers who joined through a specific form.

per_page.description: Number of records to return per page. Kit defaults to 500.

include_total_count.description: Whether Kit should include the total_count value in pagination metadata.

added_after.description: Date or timestamp used by Kit filter parameters.

added_before.description: Date or timestamp used by Kit filter parameters.

created_after.description: Date or timestamp used by Kit filter parameters.

created_before.description: Date or timestamp used by Kit filter parameters.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing subscribers for a Kit form.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the subscriber was created.

fields.description: Custom field values keyed by custom field label. Kit ignores fields that do not exist.

anyOf.description: Timestamp when the subscriber cancelled, when returned.
Subscriber attribution metadata returned by Kit.
Timestamp when the tag was created.

tags.description: Tags included on the subscriber when requested.

anyOf.description: Subscriber location metadata returned by Kit.
Timestamp when the subscriber was added to a form.
Timestamp when the subscriber was tagged.
Referrer returned for a form subscriber.
UTM parameters returned for a form subscriber.

subscribers.description: Kit subscribers returned by the request.

anyOf.description: Cursor for the first item on the current page.
Cursor for the last item on the current page.

per_page.description: Number of records returned per page.

anyOf.description: Total count when requested and returned by Kit.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Kit subscribers.

actions.name: list_forms
actions.description: List Kit forms and landing pages with optional filters and pagination.

per_page.description: Number of records to return per page. Kit defaults to 500.

include_total_count.description: Whether Kit should include the total_count value in pagination metadata.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Kit forms.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the form was created.

embed_js.description: URL for the form embed JavaScript.

items.description: A Kit form or landing page.

forms.description: Kit forms returned by the request.

anyOf.description: Cursor for the first item on the current page.
Cursor for the last item on the current page.

per_page.description: Number of records returned per page.

anyOf.description: Total count when requested and returned by Kit.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Kit forms.

updated_before.description: Date or timestamp used by Kit filter parameters.
